cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking how many Palestinian prisoners had been released by Wednesday. The first paragraph says Israel freed 26 Palestinian prisoners early Wednesday. It also mentions that this is the second of four groups, with a total of 104 to be released in four rounds. So the 26 is part of the second group. But the question is specifically about how many were released by Wednesday. The first group would have been released before the second group on Wednesday. However, the article doesn't mention the exact number of the first group. Wait, the first sentence says 26 were freed on Wednesday as the second group. So by Wednesday, that's 26 prisoners
